title: Scalar correlated subquery with group by clause mistakenly transformed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t3(a INT, b INT, c FLOAT DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT t1.a FROM t1 JOIN (SELECT COUNT(t3.a) AS count_a, t3.a FROM t3 GROUP BY t3.b, t3.a HAVING COUNT(t3.a) > 0) AS derived_1_2 ON derived_1_2.a = t1.a;
key_bug_features: Subquery transformation with group by causing multiple row error
